benefits_label: THE HIDDEN COST ON YOUR BILL
benefits_headline: Your Utility Company Is Charging You for Electricity You Never Use
benefits_paragraphs: Every month, you open that envelope (or email) and feel the sting. Another $200, $300, sometimes $400+ for electricity. You've tried turning off lights, adjusting the thermostat, even buying 'energy-efficient' appliances. Yet the bill keeps climbing. Here's what your power company won't tell you: up to 40% of what they charge you for is 'dirty electricity' — power that's wasted in your walls before it ever reaches your devices.

This isn't your fault. The electricity entering your home is unstable, filled with voltage spikes and reactive currents that your meter measures and bills you for, but your appliances can't actually use. It's like paying for a full tank of gas but only getting half in your car. Month after month, you're essentially throwing hundreds of dollars down the drain.

StopWatt changes the game. Our patented EST technology acts like a smart filter, capturing that wasted energy and recycling it back into your home's power supply. Your appliances get the clean, stable power they need — and you stop paying for what you don't use. Most customers see their bills drop 20-65% in the first 30 days. That's $300 to $600+ back in your pocket every year, just for plugging in one small device.
urgency_text: Over 8,400 units sold this week alone. Inventory is running low.

features.title: Captures Wasted Power
features.description: StopWatt's EST technology identifies unstable electricity that would normally be lost as heat in your walls. It recycles this 'dirty power' back into usable energy, immediately lowering what your meter records — and what you're charged for.

features.title: UL Safety Certified
features.description: Independently tested and certified by Underwriters Laboratories — the same gold-standard safety organization that certifies your phone, laptop, and kitchen appliances. Zero risk. Total peace of mind.

features.title: Cleans Your Power Supply
features.description: Modern electronics create electrical 'noise' that wastes energy. StopWatt filters out this interference, so your devices run more efficiently and draw less power from the grid — savings you can measure on your actual bill.

features.title: Protects Your Appliances
features.description: Voltage spikes silently destroy expensive equipment over time. StopWatt acts as a buffer, absorbing harmful surges before they reach your refrigerator, HVAC, TV, and computers — saving you from costly repairs or replacements.

features.title: Zero Setup Required
features.description: No tools. No wiring. No waiting for an electrician. Simply plug StopWatt into any standard outlet and it starts working immediately. Your entire home's electrical system is optimized in 10 seconds flat.

features.title: Guaranteed Monthly Savings
features.description: Unlike knockoffs that promise the world and deliver nothing, StopWatt produces measurable results on your actual utility bill. Most customers see 20-65% savings within 30 days — or we'll refund every penny.

science_headline: How StopWatt Stops the Waste and Slashes Your Bill
science_subheadline: Patented EST Technology — Simple, Smart, Effective
science_image_alt: StopWatt EST technology reduces wasted electricity and lowers monthly bills
science_title: 3 Steps to Lower Electric Bills (No Engineering Degree Required)

science_steps.text: Electricity from the grid arrives chaotic and 'dirty.' StopWatt's capacitors smooth out these fluctuations, converting erratic power into steady, usable current your appliances can actually use — instead of wasting as heat.

Those tiny power surges you never notice? They're silently damaging your expensive appliances AND being counted by your meter. StopWatt captures these spikes before they hit your devices, protecting your investments while reducing what you're charged for.

Here's the magic: instead of letting 'reactive power' escape into your walls as wasted heat, StopWatt captures it and feeds it back into your home's circuits. You use the SAME electricity more efficiently — so you pay for less of it.

science_result: Bottom line: Your home uses less electricity from the grid while your appliances run better. Typical result? 20-65% off your monthly bill — guaranteed, or we'll refund every cent.
science_cta_text: Claim Your 65% Discount — Start Saving Today

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know Before You Start Saving

faq_items.question: Is StopWatt legit, or is this another internet scam?
faq_items.answer: We get this question a lot — and we respect the skepticism. Here's the truth: StopWatt is UL Certified (the same independent safety lab that certifies your phone, laptop, and TV). It's RoHS compliant (no hazardous materials). We have over 100,000 verified customers. And most importantly, we offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If it doesn't lower your bill, you get every penny back. We can only offer that guarantee because StopWatt actually works. Try it risk-free and see for yourself.

faq_items.question: How exactly does StopWatt lower my electric bill?
faq_items.answer: Your utility meter measures ALL the electricity that enters your home — including power that's wasted before it ever reaches your appliances. This 'dirty electricity' (unstable currents, voltage spikes, reactive power) makes up 30-40% of your bill. StopWatt's patented EST technology captures this wasted energy, cleans it, and recycles it back into your home's circuits. You use the same appliances the same way — but you draw less power from the grid. Less measured usage = lower bill. It's that simple.

faq_items.question: Is it safe? Will it damage my appliances or home?
faq_items.answer: Safer than the charger you plug your phone into every night. StopWatt is UL Certified — the gold standard for electrical safety in America. It doesn't modify your wiring, draw significant power, or interfere with your circuits. It simply plugs into any standard outlet and starts working. Think of it like a water filter for your electricity: it cleans what's already there without changing your plumbing. Completely safe for homes with kids, pets, elderly family members — everyone.

faq_items.question: What if it doesn't work for MY home?
faq_items.answer: Then you pay nothing. Every StopWatt device comes with a 60-day, no-questions-asked, money-back guarantee. If you don't see a measurable reduction in your electric bill within 60 days, email support@stopwatts.com with your order number. We'll process a full refund within 5-10 business days. In most cases, you don't even need to return the device. We're only happy if you're saving money — that's why over 100,000 families trust StopWatt.

faq_items.question: How many devices do I actually need for my home?
faq_items.answer: It depends on your square footage: Studio or 1-bedroom apartment (under 1,000 sq ft): 1 unit is plenty. Small to medium home (1,000-1,500 sq ft): 2 units for optimal coverage. Larger home (1,500-2,500 sq ft): 3 units recommended. Place them near your breaker panel or distribute across different floors. Each unit works independently to stabilize the electrical current in its zone. Many customers start with one, see the savings, then order more to maximize their bill reduction.

faq_items.question: How soon will I see savings on my bill?
faq_items.answer: Most customers see a difference on their very next bill (within 30 days). However, StopWatt works progressively — it gets better over time as it 'cleans' your home's electrical system. Month 1: typically 10-20% savings. Month 2-3: savings increase to 20-40%. Month 4+: many customers see their highest savings of 40-65%. Pro tip: Compare your bill to the same month last year for the most accurate measurement, since electricity use varies by season.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription? Are there hidden fees?
faq_items.answer: Zero subscriptions. Zero hidden fees. Zero ongoing costs. You pay once, and StopWatt works for years. The device draws less than $1 per year in electricity to operate. No filter replacements. No maintenance. No 'premium upgrades.' Just plug it in and start saving. It's a one-time investment that typically pays for itself in 2-3 months, then keeps putting money back in your pocket for years.

faq_items.question: Which package should I order?
faq_items.answer: Most homeowners get the best value from the 3-unit package at $117.60 (65% off). Here's why: At average savings of $40/month, you'll break even in under 3 months. Everything after that is pure savings. Even if you only save $25/month (the low end), you're still saving $300/year — a 2.5x return on your investment. The 2-unit package ($98) works well for smaller homes, and the single unit ($49) is perfect for apartments. All packages include free shipping and our 60-day guarantee.

modals.title: Privacy Policy - StopWatt Official USA
modals.intro: Effective date: April 1, 2026. This Privacy Policy explains how StopWatt Distributors LLC collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit our official USA website.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, billing address, payment info, phone number) and automatically (IP address, browser type, device info, pages visited, cookies, referring URLs, and location data). We may also receive data from third-party analytics and advertising partners like Google and Meta.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to: process and fulfill orders; communicate about order status; provide customer support via support@stopwatts.com; send promotional emails (unsubscribe anytime); analyze site traffic to improve user experience; comply with legal obligations; prevent fraud; and personalize your shopping experience.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies including: Google Analytics (traffic analysis), Meta Pixel (advertising optimization), session cookies (shopping cart), and retargeting cookies (relevant ads). You can control cookies via browser settings. Opting out of analytics won't affect site functionality.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Data Sharing
sections.content: We do NOT sell your personal data. We only share with: payment processors (Stripe/PayPal) to complete transactions; shipping carriers (USPS/UPS/FedEx) to deliver orders; analytics providers (Google) in anonymized form; and advertising platforms (Meta/Google) using hashed data only. All partners are contractually bound to protect your data.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain personal data as long as necessary to fulfill orders, comply with legal obligations (typically 5 years for tax records), and resolve disputes. You may request deletion anytime by emailing support@stopwatts.com with subject 'Data Deletion Request'. We respond within 30 days per CCPA requirements.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security Measures
sections.content: All data transmission uses 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption. We employ firewalls, access controls, secure server infrastructure, and regular security audits. No system is 100% secure, but we follow industry best practices to protect your information.

sections.heading: 7. Your Privacy Rights (CCPA/GDPR)
sections.content: US Residents (California CCPA): Right to know what data we collect, right to delete your data, right to opt-out of sale (we don't sell data). To exercise rights, email support@stopwatts.com. We respond within 30 days. No discrimination for exercising privacy rights.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.content: This website is not directed at children under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a child, contact us immediately at support@stopwatts.com for deletion.

sections.heading: 9. International Data Transfers
sections.content: Data may be processed on servers located in the United States. By using our site, you consent to data transfer to the USA. We comply with applicable data protection laws including GDPR for EU visitors.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy periodically. Changes posted here with updated effective date. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Significant changes will be notified via email to registered users.

sections.heading: 11. Contact Us
sections.content: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights: Email support@stopwatts.com with subject 'Privacy Request'. Mail: StopWatt Distributors LLC, 1200 Main Street, Suite 400, Dallas, TX 75202. We respond within 30 days.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds Policy - StopWatt USA
modals.intro: We want you completely satisfied with your StopWatt purchase. Our 60-day money-back guarantee ensures you can try StopWatt risk-free.

sections.heading: 60-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: Every StopWatt purchase is covered by our 60-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied for any reason, request a full refund within 60 days of purchase. No questions asked. No hassle. The guarantee is real and honored — that's how we've earned trust from 100,000+ customers.

sections.heading: How to Request a Refund
sections.content: To initiate a refund: (1) Email support@stopwatts.com with subject 'Refund Request - Order #[Your Order Number]', (2) Include your full name, order number from confirmation email, and email used at checkout, (3) Briefly explain reason (optional, but helps us improve), (4) Wait for confirmation — we respond within 1-2 business days with instructions.

sections.heading: Refund Eligibility and Conditions
sections.content: Qualifying for refund: Request within 60 days of purchase date. Opened and used devices are accepted — we trust you gave it a fair try. Most refunds processed WITHOUT requiring return of device. Non-refundable: Shipping charges (unless product was defective), purchases beyond 60-day window, products bought from unauthorized third parties (Amazon, eBay, etc.).

sections.heading: Refund Processing Timeline
sections.content: Step 1: Refund request reviewed within 1-2 business days. Step 2: Once approved, refund processed within 5-10 business days to original payment method. Step 3: Bank/credit card processing takes additional 3-5 business days to appear on your statement. Total time: typically 7-15 business days from request to funds in your account.

sections.heading: Damaged or Defective Items
sections.content: If you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item: Contact us within 7 days of delivery at support@stopwatts.com with photos of damage and packaging. We will arrange FREE replacement or full refund at no cost to you — including shipping. Your satisfaction is guaranteed.

sections.heading: Important Purchase Notice
sections.content: To ensure your order qualifies for our 60-day money-back guarantee, ALWAYS purchase through the official product link on THIS website (getstopwatt-us.com). Third-party marketplace purchases (Amazon, eBay, Walmart) may NOT be covered by the same guarantee terms and could be counterfeit products. Protect yourself — buy official.

modals.title: Contact StopWatt Support - USA
modals.intro: We're here to help! Our USA-based support team is ready to assist with questions, orders, refunds, or technical support.

sections.heading: Customer Support Email (Recommended)
sections.content: For fastest response, email us: support@stopwatts.com. Use subject lines like: 'Order Status - #[Number]', 'Refund Request - #[Number]', or 'Technical Question'. Include your order number if applicable. We aim to respond within 1-2 business days, often same day during business hours.

sections.heading: Phone Support
sections.content: Call us toll-free: +1 (888) 555-0199. Available Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM Central Time (CT). Closed weekends and major US holidays (New Year's, Memorial Day, July 4th, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas). Leave a voicemail after hours — we return calls next business day.

sections.heading: Mailing Address
sections.content: StopWatt Distributors LLC, 1200 Main Street, Suite 400, Dallas, TX 75202, USA. NOTE: This is our administrative office. Returns should ONLY be sent to addresses provided in your return authorization email. Unsolicited returns to this address cannot be processed.

sections.heading: Order and Refund Inquiries
sections.content: When contacting about orders/refunds, please include: (1) Your complete order number from confirmation email, (2) Email address used at checkout, (3) Date of purchase (approximate is fine), (4) Brief description of issue. This information helps us locate your account instantly and resolve your issue faster.

sections.heading: Response Time Commitment
sections.content: Email inquiries: 1-2 business days. Refund requests: Within 1 business day. Phone calls: Immediate during business hours. After-hours voicemails: Next business day. We value your time and work hard to provide prompt, helpful support. Your satisfaction is our priority.

sections.heading: About StopWatt Distributors LLC
